message:
feat: scale FragmentDO fan-out to 100 slots + partition-aware ingest

FragmentDO fan-out:
- FRAGMENT_POOL_MAX raised from 20 → 100 (idle slots cost nothing)
- claimSlots now returns partial allocation (uses whatever is available)
- Local parallel fallback when all slots busy (Promise.all instead of sequential)
- Logs fan-out decisions: fragments, slots claimed, chunks per slot

Partition-aware ingest:
- AppendOptions.partitionBy splits rows by column value into separate fragments
- Each partition value gets its own Lance fragment → clean partition boundaries
- Enables O(1) partition catalog lookup at query time
- DatasetMeta.partitionBy field for explicit partition column

Partition catalog improvements:
- buildPartitionCatalog prefers explicit partitionBy over auto-detection
- Auto-detect picks column with most distinct values (< 10K) as partition key

Docs: added partitionBy example to DataFrame API write operations
